text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Spring is in the air... The spring G1 season,
that is.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Let's take this chance to score an easy victory
and build up some momentum.
choice_data_list: Not intimidated by a G1 race, huh?
Not intimidated by a G1 race, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. If this was enough to spook me, I'd be a
lost cause for the rest of the season.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter who I'm up against. All I need to
do is be first across the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Time to win in style! I'll show them all what I'm
made of!
